postReview.title: Brazil 1-0 Ecuador: Rodrygo strike hands Selecao much-needed win
postReview.description: Brazil were in dire need of three points in the CONMEBOL World Cup qualifiers, and they got them versus Ecuador, thanks to Rodrygo.
